posts.author: Tapology
posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 10 of 10 Pending | Tied for 1st with 96 others Medkouri vs. NevesEduardo Neves, TKO, R1lol this is definitely a ufc eliminator isn’t it. Both these guys suck but I suppose HW can always use new names. I get the pick rate since Neves has had some embarrassing losses, but Badr sucks too. From what I remember he can’t wrestle at all and is a former rugby player. I’m pretty sure he’s mid 30s as well. If he gets a td it’s probably over but I think Neves can win on the feet. Badr is not goodMorozov vs. RamazanovEvgeny Morozov, DECMorozov is kind of underwhelming but he’s a pretty good regional fighter. He struggles with tdd but his offensive wrestling is goodAtdayev vs. NuralievDzhafar Nuraliev, SUB, R3Thi is a cool fight, hopefully Ata finally makes it to the cage. He was a super intriguing prospect a few years ago but ever since the Russia/ukraine war he has been MIA. Hes Ukranian and not active on IG so my only assumption is he’s been on the frontlines. He was booked in uaew last year but never fought so idk what’s up with that. If he comes back lookin how he did, he should cruise but with 4 years off and almost being 30 I do not have the biggest expectationsFares vs. SandigonFlobater Fares, TKO, R3I missed his last fight but Flobater impressed me when I last saw him at UAE. He should win this easily, the Filipinos in uaew are what Brazilians are to ACA
